title: `Eyn #5872
definition:
En-gedi = "fount of the kid"

 1) a town in the wilderness of Judah on the western shore of the Dead Sea
nasbUsage:
Definition: En-gedi = "fount of the kid"

 1) a town in the wilderness of Judah on the western shore of the Dead Sea

    NASB:  spring of a kid, a place on W. shore of the Dead Sea
